scripts.compose:logs: docker compose logs --no-color --tail=100 api web worker-node worker-python minio-init
scripts.worker:test: npm --workspace @shore-sentinel/worker-node test && PYTHONPATH=workers/worker-python python3 -m unittest discover -s workers/worker-python/test
scripts.test: npm run worker:test && npm run api:test && npm run web:test
scripts.check: python3 scripts/validate_phase0.py && npm run scanner:validate && npm run compose:smoke && npm run worker:test && npm --workspace @shore-sentinel/api run check && npm run web:test
